chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA No.0 327 0[ 2015 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24,11,2016 For orders on office objections For orders on M A N0.3078/2016 3, Fur Katcha Peshi Mohammad Afzal Jagirani, advocate for the petitioner, Mr Abdul Hamid Bhurgri, Addl A,G, alongwith ASI Manzoor Ahmed Domki, incharge SHO PS C/ Scction, Kandhkot Mr. Nisar Ahmed G Abro DAG Commenta fIled by respondent No.9 are taken FCCOrd, Copy thereof is supplied to learned Counsel for the petitioner, who after going through the same submits Ihis petition may be disposed of directing the official respondents to act accordance with law and to provide legal protection to the petitioner, as and when required by him Order accordingly Peuition stands disposed of JUDGE UDGE ١٢ that strictly
